metadata.title: VasaVant: Operational Intelligence Studio
metadata.description: Turn scattered data and manual workflows into structured intelligence systems.

hero.subtitle: VasaVant turns scattered data and manual workflows into structured intelligence systems you can query, automate, and operate through AI-assisted agents.
hero.imageAlt: Team collaborating on operational workflows with dashboards and connected tools

problem.label: The problem
problem.description: Most companies run on controlled chaos: critical information in silos, workflows dependent on manual intervention, operational visibility a constant luxury.
problem.toolsLabel: Built with tools you already use
problem.imageAlt: Scattered business tools flowing into a unified operational intelligence system

testimonial.quote: The agent is only as useful as the system underneath it. We structure the operation first, then deploy intelligence.
testimonial.imageAlt: Abstract editorial portrait representing a VasaVant client voice

solution.bannerTitle: We're transparent with the stack: structure first, intelligence second.
solution.maturityFooter: VasaVant guides your organization through this progression, building each layer systematically until you achieve full operational intelligence.

processPillars.title: Map the operation

featuredServices.title: Conversational Business Intelligence
featuredServices.subtitle: Query your operation from WhatsApp

bullets: Instant answers from live operational data
No new app for your team to learn

featuredServices.title: Agentic Operations
featuredServices.subtitle: Autonomous execution on solid architecture
featuredServices.description: Digital agents that navigate internal systems, parse documents, update records, and run repetitive administration.

meta.title: Logistics & Trucking | VasaVant
meta.description: Fleet, trip, and delivery tracking with structured operational intelligence.

hero.title: Logistics & Trucking
hero.subtitle: Fleet, trip, and maintenance visibility in one queryable, automatable system.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration of fleet, delivery routes, and unified logistics dashboard

challenges: Trip data scattered across WhatsApp, sheets, and ERP
Low visibility into utilization per unit or route
outcomes: Unified trip and status logging in real time
Conversational queries on fleet and deliveries
logistics.imageAlt: Fleet and routes connected to operational dashboard

meta.title: Field Operations | VasaVant
meta.description: Real-time coordination of teams, assets, and location.

hero.title: Field Operations & Assets
hero.subtitle: Equipment utilization, location, and team coordination from a single operational layer.
hero.imageAlt: Field teams with geolocated assets and coordination dashboard

challenges: Coordination via messages without structured records
Assets without usage history or reliable location
Field reports arriving late or incomplete
outcomes: Instant visibility into asset and team status
Auditable history per asset and visit

meta.title: Sales Operations | VasaVant

hero.title: Sales Operations
hero.subtitle: Pipeline visibility, lead routing, and follow-up without friction in your CRM.
hero.imageAlt: Commercial pipeline with routed leads and conversion metrics

challenges: Opaque pipeline across CRM, sheets, and messages
Leads without routing or clear SLAs
outcomes: Unified pipeline with stages and owners
Instant answers on sales and conversion

challenges: Plant data in manual or isolated records

meta.title: Terms & Conditions | VasaVant
meta.description: Terms governing use of the VasaVant website and related services.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms apply to your use of the VasaVant website. By browsing or contacting us through this site, you agree to the conditions below.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
paragraphs: VasaVant provides operational intelligence consulting and custom systems for businesses. References to "we", "us", or "VasaVant" mean the entity operating this website.
Business inquiries and contracts are handled separately from this public site. Nothing on this website constitutes a binding offer until agreed in writing.

sections.title: 2. Use of the website
paragraphs: You may use this site for lawful purposes only. You must not attempt to disrupt the site, scrape it in a way that impairs performance, or use it to transmit malware or unlawful content.
Content on this site is provided for general information. We may update or remove pages at any time without notice.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual property
paragraphs: Text, visuals, logos, and other materials on this site are owned by VasaVant or used with permission. You may not copy, modify, or redistribute them for commercial purposes without our prior written consent.
Client work, deliverables, and project IP are governed by separate engagement agreements, not these website terms.

sections.title: 4. Contact and communications
paragraphs: When you email us or otherwise reach out, you are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide. We use your message to evaluate and respond to your inquiry.
We do not guarantee a response time through this site, though we aim to reply within the timeframe stated on our contact page.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer
paragraphs: The site and its content are provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, we disclaim warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of this website. Our total liability related to the site is limited to the extent allowed by applicable law.

sections.title: 6. Governing law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of Mexico, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Courts in Mexico City shall have exclusive jurisdiction, unless mandatory local law requires otherwise.
If any provision is held invalid, the remaining provisions stay in effect.

sections.title: 7. Changes
paragraphs: We may revise these terms by posting an updated version on this page. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
For questions about these terms, contact us at hello@vasavant.com.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | VasaVant
meta.description: How VasaVant collects and uses information when you visit our website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information we collect when you use the VasaVant website, how we use it, and the choices you have.

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
paragraphs: When you browse the site, we may collect technical data such as IP address, browser type, device type, pages viewed, and approximate location derived from your connection.
If you contact us by email, we receive the information you choose to send (for example name, company, and message content).

sections.title: 2. How we use information
paragraphs: We use website data to operate and improve the site, understand aggregate traffic patterns, and maintain security.
We use contact information to respond to inquiries, evaluate potential engagements, and maintain business correspondence.

sections.title: 3. Legal bases
paragraphs: Where applicable, we process data based on legitimate interests (operating the website), your consent (non-essential cookies when enabled), and steps prior to entering a contract (responding to your inquiry).

sections.title: 4. Cookies
paragraphs: We use essential cookies and local storage to remember your cookie preference and keep core site functionality working.
We do not use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies on this site. You can accept or dismiss the cookie notice; your choice is stored in your browser.
You can clear cookies and site data at any time through your browser settings.

sections.title: 5. Sharing and retention
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with infrastructure providers that host or deliver the site, under confidentiality obligations.
We retain contact correspondence as long as needed for business and legal purposes, then delete or anonymize it when no longer required.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, and to object to certain processing.
To exercise these rights, email hello@vasavant.com. We will respond within a reasonable period.

sections.title: 7. Security and international transfers
paragraphs: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information. No method of transmission over the internet is fully secure.
If data is processed outside your country, we take steps consistent with applicable law to protect it.

sections.title: 8. Changes and contact
paragraphs: We may update this policy by posting a new version on this page. The "last updated" date will change when we do.
Questions about privacy: hello@vasavant.com.
